"'''Hard Currency'''" was a four-part comic appearing in ''[[Dark Horse Extra]]'' #21-#24 which was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. Published March 2000. It was a follow-up to ''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood]]'', and is a lead-in to ''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost]]''.

It was written by [[Randy Stradley]], drawn by [[Isaac Buckminster Owens]], lettered by [[Michael Taylor]], and colored by [[Jason Hvam]].

==Plot summary==
The story consists of [[Kir Kanos]] in his guise as [[Kir Kanos|Kenix Kil]] being hired to kill a mark, with it in reality being a trap executed by [[Massimo]].
